description: A visitor with mobility issues wants to know if the Eiffel Tower is wheelchair accessible.

nodes.task_description: Identify the attraction (Eiffel Tower) and the specific query (wheelchair accessibility).
Retrieve accessibility information for the Eiffel Tower from the knowledge base.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds information stating that elevators provide access to the first and second floors for wheelchair users.

nodes.task_description: Clearly communicate the accessibility details to the visitor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately explains which parts of the attraction are accessible.
